finding_results.notes: Merged the schedule-trigger confrontation and week-design ask into one uninterrupted escalation that runs directly into Ravi's admission. Removed reset bargaining and added a concrete new mechanism (triad schedule thread plus weekly call) that creates forward consequence beyond chapter-14 baseline terms.

The post-confession cooldown now holds embodied awkwardness through multiple failed attempts at normal interaction before humor release, and the ending names a concrete unresolved practical strain (ongoing overtime pressure against remaining utility arrears) instead of abstract closure.

summary: Chapter 16 now sustains a single confrontation arc into confession, trims duplicate boundary loops, adds a concrete forward commitment with enforcement structure, preserves post-confession discomfort, and ends on a specific unresolved cost carried into chapter 17.
